message:
fix(writing): improve Barra article accessibility and factor card layout

Accessibility Improvements:
- Add `role="main"` to article container for screen reader landmark
- Add `id="main-content"` for skip-link navigation targeting
- Add `data-section` attributes to all major content sections:
  - hero, intro, returns, math, pod-life, ecosystem, factors,
    failures, future
- These section markers improve testability and enable programmatic
  navigation for assistive technologies

Factor Cards Equal-Height Fix:
- The three factor cards (RESVOL, MOM11M, SIZE) had unequal heights
  when content lengths differed, breaking visual rhythm
- Add `items-stretch` to parent grid to stretch cards to equal heights
- Convert cards to flex columns with `flex flex-col h-full`
- Add `shrink-0` to icon containers and headings to prevent compression
- Add `flex-1` to paragraph text to fill remaining vertical space
- This ensures all three cards match height of tallest card while
  keeping icons and titles aligned across the row

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
